steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
The values $f(0)=9$ and $f(1)=14$ give the points $(0,9)$ and $(1,14)$. The slope is
$$m=\frac{14-9}{1-0}=5$$

steps.title: Use the intercept
steps.content:
Since $f(0)=9$, the $y$-intercept is $9$. A linear function with slope $5$ and intercept $9$ is
$$f(x)=5x+9$$The answer is D.
